hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.bin|*.pmtiles) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Binary data assets (*.bin, *.pmtiles) are pipeline outputs - regenerate them with pipeline scripts instead of editing."}}' ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); p="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/node_modules/.bin/prettier"; case "$f" in *package-lock.json) ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.css|*.json) [ -x "$p" ] && "$p" --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; true ;; esac
